# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change in 2-4 lines.

## What changed

- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Portal/UI updated
- [ ] Week templates updated
- [ ] Project slot templates updated
- [ ] Validation workflow or scripts updated
- [ ] Repo metadata/support files updated

## Validation

- [ ] Ran `python scripts/validate_repository.py`
- [ ] Checked that `index.html` links still work
- [ ] Confirmed new markdown files start with a top-level heading

## Reusability check

- [ ] Change remains generic and not tied to a personal/team-specific environment
- [ ] Any examples are clearly framed as examples, not defaults

## Notes for reviewers

Add any context, risks, or follow-up items here.
